title: Simple Raticle Crosshair!
description: This crosshair is a fantastic addition to you game! it makes gamplay a little bit spicier!
body:
This crosshair add so much to bedwars and has propelled me up the latter in levels! 

it adds a wonderful look to your gamplay and is very simple to use. This raticle in perticular is white but there is also a fantastic _aqua_ version of this crosshair! if you want to use it you can find it on near this one on my modrinth page!

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
